title: PHP User Input
content:
### PHP User Input

PHP collects user input from HTML forms or command-line arguments.

### CLI Input

```php
<?php
echo "Enter your name: ";
$name = trim(fgets(STDIN));
echo "Hello, $name";
?>
```

### Form Input (GET)

```php
<form method="get" action="welcome.php">
  Name: <input type="text" name="name">
  <input type="submit">
</form>

// welcome.php
<?php
echo "Welcome, " . $_GET["name"];
?>
```

### Form Input (POST)

| Method | Usage | Visibility |
|--------|-------|------------|
| GET | `$_GET` | Data in URL |
| POST | `$_POST` | Data in body |
| REQUEST | `$_REQUEST` | Both GET and POST |

> **Key Point:** Always validate and sanitize user input before using it to prevent security vulnerabilities like XSS and SQL injection.
